systemRules.title: System regulations
systemRules.desc: VKsLab platform usage rules, role-based access, and general lab operating principles.

guest.desc: VKsLab welcomes experts to join our international research network.
guest.note: Login required — you will be redirected to the login page.

reviewer.desc: Review candidate profiles as lab head/director and record contracts when needed.

member.desc: Your account is already registered with the role {{roleLabel}} in VKsLab. You don’t need to apply via this channel.

admin.desc: Admin account — manage users and system settings from the dashboard.

systemRulesPage.title: VKsLab system regulations
systemRulesPage.intro: This page summarizes general rules for using the VKsLab portal and internal services. Module-specific rules may be updated separately.

access.heading: Accounts and roles
access.body: Users sign in with issued accounts; each role (director, lab head, leader, member, etc.) has its own scope for projects, publications, and training. Do not share passwords; report suspected unauthorized access immediately.

publication.heading: Publication repository and data
publication.body: Research outputs, curricula, and technical documents follow the lab approval workflow. Respect copyright and citations; do not publish confidential information or material that breaches partner agreements.

conduct.heading: Conduct and security
conduct.body: Use forums and channels for academic/technical purposes only. Do not distribute malware, spam, or abusive content. Follow organizational and partner security policies.

intellectualProperty.heading: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: Materials, curricula, lectures, and research outputs of VKsLab are protected by intellectual property rights. Copying, sharing, distributing, or commercial use without written permission from VKsLab is prohibited.

security.heading: Confidentiality and information security
security.body: Access to and use of VKsLab materials, curricula, and research must strictly follow information security rules. Disclosure, sharing, or unauthorized use is prohibited.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.body: VKsLab is committed to protecting user privacy. Personal data and data related to learning and research will be collected, stored, and processed in line with applicable personal data protection laws.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You may use VKsLab only for learning, research, and authorized work. Use for unlawful activity, distributing harmful content, spam, or anything that harms the system or other users is prohibited.

accountResponsibility.heading: Account responsibility
accountResponsibility.body: You are responsible for securing your account. Do not share your account or use someone else’s account without permission. Activity under your account is attributed to the account holder.

contentIntegrity.heading: Content integrity
contentIntegrity.body: You must not alter, distort, or misrepresent curricula, materials, or research content. Any action that undermines accuracy of information is prohibited.

systemSecurity.heading: System security
systemSecurity.body: Unauthorized access, vulnerability exploitation, reverse engineering, or disruption of VKsLab systems is prohibited. Attacks may be handled under applicable law.

dataUsage.heading: Data use
dataUsage.body: Data collected through the system may be used only for internal purposes or as permitted. Exporting, analyzing, or using data externally requires VKsLab approval.

violationHandling.heading: Enforcement
violationHandling.body: VKsLab may suspend or terminate access if rules are violated. Depending on severity, disciplinary action or legal consequences may apply.

updatePolicy.heading: Policy updates
updatePolicy.body: VKsLab may change or update these rules and policies at any time to reflect operations and legal requirements. Users are responsible for staying informed and complying with the latest version.
